approvalTitle: Implementation Readiness: V1 MVP Config Generator
content:
# Implementation Readiness Report
- **Spec**: FORGE-1-v1-mvp-config-generator
- **Generated**: 2026-03-23T20:51:00Z
- **Recommendation**: PASS

## Requirement Coverage (11/11 mapped)

| Requirement | Tasks | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| REQ-1: Navigation Hierarchy | Task 6 (sidebar, tree nav, CRUD) | Covered |
| REQ-2: Template Import via Paste | Task 7 (template editor, paste flow, section detection) | Covered |
| REQ-3: Variable Management | Task 3 (parser engine), Task 7 (variable detection panel) | Covered |
| REQ-4: Config Generator with Live Preview | Task 4 (substitution + highlighting), Task 8 (generator UI) | Covered |
| REQ-5: Section-Based Output and Copy | Task 8 (section tabs, copy buttons) | Covered |
| REQ-6: Interface Builder | Task 9 (interface builder component) | Covered |
| REQ-7: Multi-Vendor Config Format | Task 3 (parser format support), Task 4 (multi-format highlighting) | Covered |
| REQ-8: Encrypted Export/Import | Task 5 (vault engine), Task 10 (vault UI) | Covered |
| REQ-9: Browser Storage | Task 2 (storage service + Zustand store), Task 11 (welcome/empty state) | Covered |
| REQ-10: Seed Model | Task 11 (seed data + welcome screen) | Covered |
| REQ-11: Dark Theme / Branding | Task 1 (Tailwind tokens), Tasks 0.1-0.3 (prototype gate), all ui:true tasks | Covered |

**Result: 11/11 requirements have implementing tasks. No orphaned requirements.**

## Design-Task Alignment

| Design Element | Implementing Task | Status |
|----------------|-------------------|--------|
| Template Parser engine | Task 3 | Aligned |
| Substitution Engine | Task 4 | Aligned |
| Syntax Highlighter | Task 4 | Aligned |
| Vault Engine (AES-256-GCM) | Task 5 | Aligned |
| Storage Service + Zustand | Task 2 | Aligned |
| App Shell + Sidebar | Task 6 | Aligned |
| Template Editor | Task 7 | Aligned |
| Config Generator + Preview | Task 8 | Aligned |
| Interface Builder | Task 9 | Aligned |
| Vault Modal (import/export) | Task 10 | Aligned |
| Welcome Screen + Seed Data | Task 11 | Aligned |
| Docker Deployment | Task 12 | Aligned |
| TypeScript Interfaces | Task 1 | Aligned |

**Result: All design components have implementing tasks. No design elements without tasks.**

## Task Traceability

| Task | Requirements Referenced | Status |
|------|----------------------|--------|
| 0.1-0.3 (Prototype Gate) | REQ-1, REQ-4, REQ-5, REQ-11 | Valid |
| 1 (Scaffolding) | REQ-11 | Valid |
| 2 (Storage + Store) | REQ-9 | Valid |
| 3 (Template Parser) | REQ-2, REQ-3, REQ-7 | Valid |
| 4 (Substitution + Highlighting) | REQ-4, REQ-7 | Valid |
| 5 (Vault Engine) | REQ-8 | Valid |
| 6 (App Shell + Sidebar) | REQ-1, REQ-11 | Valid |
| 7 (Template Editor) | REQ-2, REQ-3 | Valid |
| 8 (Config Generator) | REQ-4, REQ-5 | Valid |
| 9 (Interface Builder) | REQ-6 | Valid |
| 10 (Vault UI) | REQ-8 | Valid |
| 11 (Welcome + Seed) | REQ-9, REQ-10 | Valid |
| 12 (Docker) | REQ-11 (deployment) | Valid |
| 13 (Integration) | All | Valid |

**Result: All tasks reference valid requirements. No orphaned tasks.**

## Contradictions

None found. Requirements, design, and tasks are internally consistent.

## Prototype Consistency

- Design declares `Has UI Changes: Yes`, `Prototype Required: Yes`
- Tasks 0.1-0.3 implement the prototype gate
- Reference HTML noted: `/Users/lbruton/Devops/Forge/forge-brand-showcase.html`
- UI tasks (6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11) are tagged `ui:true` and reference the approved prototype

**Result: Prototype gate is properly configured.**

## File Touch Map

- File Touch Map in tasks.md lists 35 files across CREATE actions
- All files mentioned in individual task descriptions appear in the map
- No task references files missing from the map

**Result: File Touch Map is consistent with task descriptions.**

## Agent Recommendation

**PASS** — All 11 requirements are fully covered by implementing tasks. Design-to-task alignment is complete with no gaps. No contradictions found between documents. The prototype gate is correctly configured for all UI tasks. This is a greenfield project with no existing code to break, which reduces integration risk. The task dependency chain (engines first → UI after prototype gate → integration last) is sound.
